    mail/dovecot-fts-flatcurve: update to 1.0.2

    Update dovecot-fts-flatcurve to the current stable release.

    Full changelog: https://github.com/slusarz/dovecot-fts-flatcurve/compare/v1.0.0...v1.0.2

    Major changes:
        Per upstream, Fix assert-crash in certain instances when doing
        multi-mailbox searches (e.g., virtual mailbox search)

    PR:             277682
    Reported by:    Martin Waschbüsch <martin@waschbuesch.de> (maintainer)
